## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `test:`, `perf:`, `build:`, `ci:`)
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] No secrets, debug statements, or commented-out code in the diff
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
